mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM alipay_bill_transactions t INNER JOIN alipay_bill_imports i ON t.bill_import_id = i.id INNER JOIN alipay_users au ON i.user_id = au.id WHERE au.person_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT wu.person_id FROM wechat_users wu WHERE wu.id IN #{id} AND wu.person_id IS NOT NULL ) AND t.is_archived = false
SELECT t.* FROM alipay_bill_transactions t WHERE t.is_archived = false AND t.phone_id IN #{id}
